records.question: Which parties with the Houseqlassics theme that started in 1999 and ended in 2010, held at Various locations, have at most 18 hosts and a main host in charge?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT party.party_id FROM party
JOIN party_host ON party.party_id = party_host.party_id
WHERE party.party_theme = 'Houseqlassics' AND party.first_year = '1999' AND party_host.is_main_in_charge = 'T' AND party.location = 'Various locations' AND party.number_of_hosts <= 18 AND party.last_year = '2010'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Party_ID FROM party AS T1 WHERE T1.Party_Theme = 'Houseqlassics' AND T1.First_year = '1999' AND T1.Location = 'Various locations' AND T1.Number_of_hosts <= 18 AND T1.Last_year = '2010' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM party_host AS T2 WHERE T1.Party_ID = T2.Party_ID AND T2.Is_Main_in_Charge = 'T')

records.question: Which parties started in 2004 with the theme In Qontrol?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT party.party_id FROM party
WHERE party.first_year = '2004' AND party.party_theme = 'In Qontrol'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Party_ID FROM party WHERE First_year = '2004' AND Party_Theme = 'In Qontrol'

records.question: Which parties started in 2004, ended in 2007, and have the theme QrimeTime?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT party.party_id FROM party
WHERE party.last_year = '2007' AND party.first_year = '2004' AND party.party_theme = 'QrimeTime'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Party_ID FROM party WHERE Last_year = '2007' AND First_year = '2004' AND Party_Theme = 'QrimeTime'

records.question: Which parties have exactly 5 hosts and are located at Hemkade 48 Zaandam?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT party.party_id FROM party
JOIN party_host ON party.party_id = party_host.party_id
WHERE party.number_of_hosts = 5 AND party.location = 'Hemkade 48 Zaandam'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Party_ID FROM party AS T1 INNER JOIN party_host AS T2 ON T1.Party_ID = T2.Party_ID WHERE T1.Number_of_hosts = 5 AND T1.Location = 'Hemkade 48 Zaandam'

records.question: Which parties held at Heineken Music Hall Amsterdam started in 2004, ended in 2007, have the QrimeTime theme, and include at least 4 hosts?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT party.party_id FROM party
WHERE party.location = 'Heineken Music Hall Amsterdam' AND party.first_year = '2004' AND party.number_of_hosts >= 4 AND party.party_theme = 'QrimeTime' AND party.last_year = '2007'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Party_ID FROM party WHERE Location = 'Heineken Music Hall Amsterdam' AND First_year = '2004' AND Number_of_hosts >= 4 AND Party_Theme = 'QrimeTime' AND Last_year = '2007'

records.question: Which parties held in Hemkade 48 Zaandam in 2000 had Austin Daye, a United States host, as the main person in charge?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT party.party_id FROM party
JOIN party_host ON party.party_id = party_host.party_id
JOIN host ON party_host.host_id = host.host_id
WHERE party.first_year = '2000' AND host.nationality = 'United States' AND party.location = 'Hemkade 48 Zaandam' AND party_host.is_main_in_charge = 'T' AND host.name = 'Austin Daye'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Party_ID FROM party AS T1 INNER JOIN party_host AS T2 ON T1.Party_ID = T2.Party_ID INNER JOIN host AS T3 ON T2.Host_ID = T3.Host_ID WHERE T1.First_year = '2000' AND T1.Location = 'Hemkade 48 Zaandam' AND T2.Is_Main_in_Charge = 'T' AND T3.Nationality = 'United States' AND T3.Name = 'Austin Daye'

records.question: What parties located at Hemkade 48 Zaandam have the theme Club Q-BASE, feature Ed Davis as a non-main-in-charge host who is 45 years old and from the United States, and have at most 23 hosts in total?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT party.party_id FROM party
JOIN party_host ON party.party_id = party_host.party_id
JOIN host ON party_host.host_id = host.host_id
WHERE party.number_of_hosts <= 23 AND party.party_theme = 'Club Q-BASE' AND host.name = 'Ed Davis' AND party_host.is_main_in_charge = 'F' AND host.nationality = 'United States' AND host.age = '45' AND party.location = 'Hemkade 48 Zaandam'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Party_ID FROM party AS T1 INNER JOIN party_host AS T2 ON T1.Party_ID = T2.Party_ID INNER JOIN host AS T3 ON T2.Host_ID = T3.Host_ID WHERE T1.Number_of_hosts <= 23 AND T1.Party_Theme = 'Club Q-BASE' AND T1.Location = 'Hemkade 48 Zaandam' AND T2.Is_Main_in_Charge = 'F' AND T3.Name = 'Ed Davis' AND T3.Nationality = 'United States' AND T3.Age = '45'

records.question: Which parties held in Various locations took place exactly in the year 2010?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT party.party_id FROM party
JOIN party_host ON party.party_id = party_host.party_id
JOIN host ON party_host.host_id = host.host_id
WHERE party.last_year = '2010' AND party.location = 'Various locations'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Party_ID FROM party AS T1 INNER JOIN party_host AS T2 ON T1.Party_ID = T2.Party_ID INNER JOIN host AS T3 ON T2.Host_ID = T3.Host_ID WHERE T1.Last_year = '2010' AND T1.Location = 'Various locations'
